headline: This Space Stocks Boom Has Echoes of the EV Bubble. Red Flags as Rocket Lab and AST Soar.
summary: The technical Wall Street term for investors short-selling space stocks right now is “getting your face ripped off.”  Shares of commercial space companies are on fire lately.  Coming into Wednesday trading, shares of  Rocket Lab  and  AST SpaceMobile  to name two, were up 74% and 55%, respectively, over the past month, leaving them both up more than 380% over the past 12 months.

headline: Why Ford Motor (F) Is Up 17.3% After EDF Signs 20 GWh Battery Storage Deal
summary: Earlier in May 2026, Ford Energy, a wholly owned Ford Motor Company unit, and EDF Power Solutions North America signed a five-year framework agreement giving EDF access to up to 4 GWh per year of grid-scale battery energy storage systems from 2028, potentially totaling 20 GWh. This move signals Ford’s push to build a meaningful presence in utility-grade energy storage, repurposing its battery capabilities beyond vehicles into long-duration grid infrastructure. We’ll now examine how Ford’s...

headline: How The Ford Motor (F) Story Is Shifting With Ford Energy And New Valuation Views
summary: Ford Motor’s fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly, with the price target moving from US$14.09 to US$13.70 per share. Analysts are tying this shift to fresh views on Ford Energy, weighing excitement around the EDF battery storage agreement and higher margin potential against questions on execution, competition, and how much of the story is already in the stock. In the sections ahead, you will see how this updated target fits into the broader analyst narrative and what to watch as the...
